site.name: Gurovich Law Group
site.tagline: Vigorous Advocacy for Life's Most Serious Legal Challenges
hero.headline: VIGOROUS ADVOCACY
hero.subheadline: FOR LIFE'S MOST SERIOUS LEGAL CHALLENGES
hero.description: High-stakes matters demand clear strategy and experienced execution. The Gurovich Law Group represents clients in personal injury, tenants' rights, criminal defense, and civil litigation with disciplined case-building and sophisticated advocacy.
practiceAreas.title: Practice Areas
practiceAreas.subtitle: Comprehensive Legal Services
practiceAreas.personalInjury.desc: Fighting for maximum compensation for accident victims and their families.
practiceAreas.criminalDefense.desc: Protecting your rights, freedom, and future against criminal charges.
practiceAreas.employmentLaw.desc: Advocating for fair treatment and employee rights in the workplace.
practiceAreas.civilLitigation.desc: Strategic representation in complex business and civil disputes.
practiceAreas.tenantRights.desc: Protecting tenants from unlawful evictions and housing violations.
about.title: Who We Are
about.subtitle: A Legacy of Trust and Excellence
about.description: At Gurovich Law Group, we pride ourselves on our years of experience in criminal defense, personal injury, and employment law. Our team is dedicated to providing personalized attention while navigating the legal system.
about.highlight1: Bilingual Team (English, Spanish, Russian, Armenian, Ukrainian)
